name: Awarding of Costs and Attorneys' Fees

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who substantially prevail against the IRS, meet net worth requirements (under $2M for individuals), and have exhausted administrative remedies.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the prevailing party in a tax dispute to recover reasonable administrative and litigation costs, including attorneys' fees, if the IRS position was not substantially justified.
